text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, September 13. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I've noted that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that calculating some savings estimates. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Refinancing is a great leverage point. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Good focus area. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Good focus area. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
